list.title: Moderation reports — Admin
list.description: Inspect moderation reports, case status, and the limited actions supported by the current backend contract.

detail.title: Moderation report — Admin
detail.description: Review one moderation report, its status, and any available operational actions.

list.title: Moderation reports
list.note: This baseline exposes the moderation report queue with the current status, target context, and the limited actions that the backend supports today.

items.list: Review the moderation report queue with filters.
items.detail: Inspect one report with its target snapshot.
items.actions: Execute limited moderation actions where permitted.

items.noCases: There is no full moderation case management console yet.
items.noAutomations: Automated resolution and escalation workflows are not exposed.
items.noBulk: Bulk moderation actions are not supported.

listError.heading: Moderation reports are not available right now
listError.note: Could not load the moderation queue.

empty.heading: No moderation reports right now
empty.note: There are no moderation reports in the current queue.

detailError.heading: Moderation report is not available right now
detailError.note: Could not load this moderation report. Try again or return to the queue.

notFound.heading: Moderation report was not found
notFound.note: We could not find this report in the current moderation scope.

detail.title: Report detail
detail.note: Use this view to inspect the report details, current status, and the limited moderation actions supported by the backend.
detail.reporterNote: Reporter identity is shown only when the backend has it on record.
detail.snapshotSummaryNote: Use this snapshot to quickly tell whether the report is still in active triage, whether target context is available, and whether this screen currently exposes limited actions or inspection only.
detail.snapshotNote: Target snapshots provide safe, read-only context for triage.

snapshot.emptyNote: This report does not include a target snapshot yet.

open.title: New report waiting for triage
open.note: This report is still open. Review the current context before deciding whether it should move forward.

review.title: Actively under review
review.note: The case is already in review, so the current surface should support careful inspection and limited next actions only.

enforcement.title: Ready for limited enforcement
enforcement.note: This report has reached the backend status where limited enforcement actions may be available for the current target.

resolved.title: Closed as resolved
resolved.note: This case is already resolved, so the operational posture here is mostly historical visibility.

dismissed.title: Closed as dismissed
dismissed.note: This case was dismissed. Use this screen for inspection and traceability only.

snapshotPresent.title: Target snapshot available
snapshotPresent.note: A target snapshot is available for safe triage context on this report.

snapshotMissing.title: Target snapshot is missing
snapshotMissing.note: The backend did not include a target snapshot for this report, so action posture should stay cautious.

limitedActions.title: Limited actions are available
limitedActions.note: This report currently exposes only the moderation actions that the backend allows for this status, role, and target type.

noActions.title: Inspection only right now
noActions.note: No moderation actions are currently available for this report status.

inspectionOnly.title: Inspection only for your role
inspectionOnly.note: This surface remains visible, but no moderation actions are available to your current operator role here.

detail.actionsNote: Actions are shown only when the backend allows them for this case status and target type.
detail.boundaryNote: This baseline keeps moderation actions narrow and contract-bound.

boundaryItems.noCaseManagement: No full case management workflow is exposed here yet.
boundaryItems.noAutomation: Automated enforcement and escalation flows are not exposed.
boundaryItems.noBulk: Bulk moderation actions are not supported.

actions.reasonRequiredNote: A reason is required for this action by the backend contract.
actions.noActions: No actions are available for this report status.
actions.notAuthorized: You do not have moderation permissions for this action set.

noActions.heading: No action is available right now
noActions.note: This report stays visible for inspection, but the current report status does not expose a moderation action.

notAuthorized.heading: This view is inspection only for your role
notAuthorized.note: You can inspect the report details, but the current operator role does not have moderation controls here.

validation.reasonRequired: A reason is required for this action.

errors.forbiddenScope: You do not have access to this moderation scope.
errors.actionNotAllowed: This action is not allowed for your role.
errors.invalidActionTarget: This action is not valid for the selected target.
errors.invalidTransition: This action is not valid for the current report status.
errors.raceCondition: The report changed before the action completed. Refresh and try again.
errors.enforcementTargetNotFound: The enforcement target reference was not found.
errors.generic: Could not complete this moderation action right now.
